title: Maintain laboratory or field workplace safety
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain laboratory or field workplace safety demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Perform all work safely

pcs.text: Use established work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of other laboratory personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use established work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of other laboratory personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use established work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of other laboratory personnel.

pcs.text: Clean, care for and store equipment, materials and reagents as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, care for and store equipment, materials and reagents as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, care for and store equipment, materials and reagents as required.

pcs.text: Minimise the generation of wastes and environmental impacts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise the generation of wastes and environmental impacts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise the generation of wastes and environmental impacts.

pcs.text: Ensure safe disposal of laboratory/hazardous wastes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure safe disposal of laboratory/hazardous wastes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure safe disposal of laboratory/hazardous wastes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Perform all work safely

elements.title: Ensure others in the work group are able to implement safe work practices

pcs.text: Ensure hazard controls and PPE appropriate to the work requirements are available and functional
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure hazard controls and PPE appropriate to the work requirements are available and functional?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure hazard controls and PPE appropriate to the work requirements are available and functional.

pcs.text: Provide and communicate current information about WHS policies, procedures and programs to others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide and communicate current information about WHS policies, procedures and programs to others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide and communicate current information about WHS policies, procedures and programs to others.

pcs.text: Ensure hazards and control measures relating to work responsibilities are known by those in the work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure hazards and control measures relating to work responsibilities are known by those in the work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure hazards and control measures relating to work responsibilities are known by those in the work area.

pcs.text: Provide support to those in the work area to implement procedures to support safety
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide support to those in the work area to implement procedures to support safety?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide support to those in the work area to implement procedures to support safety.

pcs.text: Identify and address training needs within level of responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and address training needs within level of responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and address training needs within level of responsibility.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Ensure others in the work group are able to implement safe work practices

elements.title: Monitor observance of safe work practices in the work area

pcs.text: Ensure workplace procedures are clearly defined, documented and followed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure workplace procedures are clearly defined, documented and followed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure workplace procedures are clearly defined, documented and followed.

pcs.text: Identify any deviation from identified procedures and report and address within level of responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify any deviation from identified procedures and report and address within level of responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify any deviation from identified procedures and report and address within level of responsibility.

pcs.text: Ensure personal behaviour is consistent with workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure personal behaviour is consistent with workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure personal behaviour is consistent with workplace policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Encourage and follow up others to identify and report hazards in the work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Encourage and follow up others to identify and report hazards in the work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Encourage and follow up others to identify and report hazards in the work area.

pcs.text: Monitor conditions and follow up to ensure housekeeping standards in the work area are maintained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor conditions and follow up to ensure housekeeping standards in the work area are maintained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor conditions and follow up to ensure housekeeping standards in the work area are maintained.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor observance of safe work practices in the work area

elements.title: Participate in risk management processes

pcs.text: Report and address any identified hazards and inadequacies in existing risk controls within level of responsibility and according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and address any identified hazards and inadequacies in existing risk controls within level of responsibility and according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and address any identified hazards and inadequacies in existing risk controls within level of responsibility and according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Participate in risk assessments to identify and analyse risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Participate in risk assessments to identify and analyse risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Participate in risk assessments to identify and analyse risks.

pcs.text: Support the implementation of procedures to control risk (based on the hierarchy of control)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Support the implementation of procedures to control risk (based on the hierarchy of control)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Support the implementation of procedures to control risk (based on the hierarchy of control).

pcs.text: Ensure records of incidents in the work area and other required documentation are accurately completed and maintained according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure records of incidents in the work area and other required documentation are accurately completed and maintained according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure records of incidents in the work area and other required documentation are accurately completed and maintained according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Participate in risk management processes

elements.title: Support the implementation of participative arrangements

pcs.text: Inform and consult work group on WHS issues relevant to the work role
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform and consult work group on WHS issues relevant to the work role?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform and consult work group on WHS issues relevant to the work role.

pcs.text: Promptly report outcomes of consultation on WHS issues back to the work group
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Promptly report outcomes of consultation on WHS issues back to the work group?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Promptly report outcomes of consultation on WHS issues back to the work group.

pcs.text: Resolve, or promptly refer to appropriate personnel, matters raised relating to WHS
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Resolve, or promptly refer to appropriate personnel, matters raised relating to WHS?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Resolve, or promptly refer to appropriate personnel, matters raised relating to WHS.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Support the implementation of participative arrangements

elements.title: Support the implementation of emergency procedures within the work group

pcs.text: Ensure that workplace procedures for dealing with incidents and emergencies are available and known by work group
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that workplace procedures for dealing with incidents and emergencies are available and known by work group?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that workplace procedures for dealing with incidents and emergencies are available and known by work group.

pcs.text: Implement processes to ensure that others in the work area are able to respond appropriately to incidents and emergencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement processes to ensure that others in the work area are able to respond appropriately to incidents and emergencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement processes to ensure that others in the work area are able to respond appropriately to incidents and emergencies.

pcs.text: Participate, as required, in investigations of hazardous incidents to identify their cause
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Participate, as required, in investigations of hazardous incidents to identify their cause?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Participate, as required, in investigations of hazardous incidents to identify their cause.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Support the implementation of emergency procedures within the work group

minimum_expected_knowledge: The candidate demonstrates that they can Support the implementation of procedures to control risk (based on the hierarchy of control).

indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
